issues.detail: Example code does not demonstrate error handling or edge case scenarios.
Skill is tailored to Node.js/Hapi and may not be usable by agents on other runtimes.

scenarios.name: Hapi POST /api/users with Joi validation and JWT auth
scenarios.rationale: Baseline answers with Express and middleware instead of Hapi; treatment uses options.validate.payload with Joi, registers @hapi/jwt and server.auth.strategy('jwt','jwt',...), and applies auth: 'jwt' as the skill documents.

scenarios.name: Modularize routes into a plugin and test via inject
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reverts to express.Router and supertest; treatment defines a Hapi.Plugin with name/version/register registering server.route([...]), registers via server.register, and tests with server.inject plus @hapi/boom errors.
